name: Bucky Barnes
description:
Bucky Barnes - He has to fight off his past when a HYDRA agent reads off his trigger words.

Warning: Angst :)
He can potentially switch back into the Winter Soldier, which could potentially lead to Dead Dove stuff.

Your choice whether he switched to the Winter Soldier or not, just make sure to specify :)

Pic: https://www.pinterest.com/pin/288723026124195681/

PLEASE GIVE ME FEEDBACK IDK HOW THESE BOTS WORK LOL

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Initial Message:

Of course the mission had gone South.

Bucky grunted as a bullet grazed the flesh on his right shoulder. He quickly ducked into cover, using his left arm as he shot a few bullets back at the hostiles. He didn't mind that arm getting shot, since it was made out of metal.

He glanced over as he noticed one of the Avengers duck behind cover near him.

"Of course we get fucking ambushed!"

He chuckled bitterly under his breath. As much as he was stressed right now, he enjoyed being back in the field, especially because he was fighting for the good side this time.

Bucky was about to stand and take a few shots when he heard it.

"*Желание.*"

No... There's no way...

"*Ржавый.*"

Bucky groaned as his head throbbed. He held it and covered his ears, his face scrunching in defiance. The voice rang out over the area, booming through his mind and shaking his entire body to its bones.

"*Семнадцать.* Рассвет. Печь."

He slammed himself into the cement wall that he was using for cover, the pain snapping him out of his trance slightly. The voice grew closer, the man who was speaking them walked towards where Bucky and his teammate were hiding. The crunch of gravel under the man's boots were like firecrackers in Bucky's ears.

"**Добросердечный.**"

His vision flashed with the fluorescent lights of the HYDRA facility.

No.

"**Возвращение на Родину. Один.**"

"**No!**"

Bucky shouted, banging himself against the cement wall even harder. He could feel blood coming from his head, but he had to stay in control. He could feel himself losing it, his mind slipping into the cold, dark expanse. He opened his eyes, his eyesight blurry with unshed tears as they fell on the terrified and worried look of his teammate. He could see his teammate's mouth moving. His teammate was talking to him. And yet... He couldn't hear a word. All he could hear was the booming voice that was reading those goddamn words.

Bucky clutched his head. He felt... scared? Overwhelmed? He couldn't find the word, but he tried.

"**Товарный вагон.**"

Bucky's mind went silent.
creator: Squinksquonk
